commands: export HOME=/root && echo '=== PHP Syntax Check ===' && for f in /opt/pedagolens/plugins/pedagolens-*/includes/*.php /opt/pedagolens/plugins/pedagolens-*/admin/*.php /opt/pedagolens/plugins/pedagolens-*/*.php; do php -l "$f" 2>&1; done
echo '=== WP DEBUG LOG ===' && tail -80 /var/www/html/wp-content/debug.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'NO_DEBUG_LOG'
